addedResourceForeground.$description: Color for added Git resources used for file labels and the SCM viewlet

modifiedResourceForeground.$description: Color for modified Git resources used for file labels and the SCM viewlet

deletedResourceForeground.$description: Color for deleted Git resources used for file labels and the SCM viewlet

untrackedResourceForeground.$description: Color for untracked Git resources used for file labels and the SCM viewlet

ignoredResourceForeground.$description: Color for ignored Git resources used for file labels and the SCM viewlet

conflictingResourceForeground.$description: Color for conflicting Git resources used for file labels and the SCM viewlet

renamedResourceForeground.$description: Color for renamed or copied Git resources used for file labels

stageModifiedResourceForeground.$description: Color for staged modifications git decorations used for file labels

stageDeletedResourceForeground.$description: Color for staged deletions git decorations used for file labels
